tagline: Book nature activities, camping & fishing spots

home.heroSubtitle: Find and book camping spots, fishing lakes, kayaking trails and more — all in one place.
home.statsTitle: Trusted by nature lovers across the region
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Book your perfect outdoor spot in three simple steps.

find.title: Find a Location
find.desc: Browse our curated list of outdoor venues — camping grounds, fishing lakes, kayaking rivers and more.

pick.title: Pick Your Spot
pick.desc: Use our interactive map to select exactly the spot you want — no surprises when you arrive.

book.title: Book & Enjoy
book.desc: Complete your booking in minutes. Get an email confirmation and head out to nature.

home.gallerySubtitle: From peaceful lakeside camps to thrilling river adventures — we have it all.
home.featuresSubtitle: A complete platform for booking and managing outdoor activity spots.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join nature lovers and book your outdoor experience today. Registration is free.

map.title: Interactive Maps
map.desc: Select your exact spot on an interactive map before booking.

booking.title: Easy Booking
booking.desc: Multi-step registration with instant confirmation and email receipts.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.desc: Your personal data is protected. Edit or cancel your booking at any time.

activities.title: Many Activities
activities.desc: Camping, fishing, kayaking, hiking and more — all in one platform.
